mapper.select: SELECT id, spec_eqp_vt_code, spec_eqp_vt_name, spec_eqp_vt_area, spec_eqp_vt_model, spec_eqp_vt_material, spec_eqp_vt_volume, spec_eqp_vt_design_pressure, spec_eqp_vt_design_temp, spec_eqp_vt_media, spec_eqp_vt_media_property, spec_eqp_vt_manufacturer, spec_eqp_vt_factory_no, spec_eqp_vt_produce_date, spec_eqp_vt_install_company, spec_eqp_vt_install_date, spec_eqp_vt_acceptance_date, spec_eqp_vt_usage_date, spec_eqp_vt_license_no, spec_eqp_vt_status, spec_eqp_vt_last_inspect_date, spec_eqp_vt_next_inspect_date, spec_eqp_vt_inspect_company, spec_eqp_vt_maintain_responsible, spec_eqp_vt_maintain_record, spec_eqp_vt_accident_record, spec_eqp_vt_create_time, spec_eqp_vt_update_time, spec_eqp_vt_factory, spec_eqp_vt_backup1, spec_eqp_vt_backup2, spec_eqp_vt_backup3 FROM spec_eqp_vertical_tank_account
